name: Quebec Innovative Materials Corp.
description: Quebec Innovative Materials Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company with a portfolio of natural resource assets including natural hydrogen, high-grade silica, and helium properties across Ontario, Quebec, Nova Scotia, and Minnesota. The company's most active 2026 project is its West Advocate natural hydrogen program in Nova Scotia, where Phase 1 drilling intersected significant hydrogen-bearing structural zones at depths exceeding 400 metres. Quebec Innovative Materials is at the early exploration stage, pioneering natural hydrogen exploration in Atlantic Canada.
